title: colubrina heteroneura
intro: Colubrina heteroneura, also known as the Guanacaste or Mexican coral tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Colubrina heteroneura include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal agent, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming Colubrina heteroneura extracts include the potential reduction of oxidative stress, improvement of cardiovascular health, and support for the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a cream or ointment.
